name: zpl-engine-mcp
description: Mathematical stability engine. 55 tools for measuring balance and bias in finance, gaming, AI/ML, security, and crypto data. AIN score is a STABILITY measurement, not a prediction or recommendation. v3.2: 4 new tools (zpl_about, zpl_quota, zpl_score_only, zpl_validate_input), auto-update check, friendly signup message, hard disclaimers on hypothetical/bias tools, RNG sample-size warnings.
author: Ciciu Alexandru-Costinel — Zero Point Logic <cicicalex20@gmail.com>
